summary: Frontend-only verification of FooterExtras legal-links fix (bundle main.63005d94.js). All 8 requested checks PASS: bundle served, footer-legal-{terms,privacy,cookies} render exact 'Terms of Use'/'Privacy Policy'/'Cookies Policy' in Title Case; 'TEST TERMS 605E6D' absent from DOM; computed style text-transform=none and font-family='system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif' (no Plex Mono), fontSize=13px, letter-spacing=normal; click on footer-legal-terms opens legal-modal-terms with title 'Terms of Use' from DB; light & dark themes both correct; footer-copyright shows '© 2026'; /api/public/legal-settings returns legal[].title in correct Title Case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer legal-links narrow-scope fix verified. Labels come from LEGAL_LABELS const, not from DB titles. Computed font-family is system-ui (no mono). Modal still pulls title from /api/public/legal-settings which is correctly 'Terms of Use'. Cookie consent banner can intercept clicks on footer buttons — dismiss it via 'Accept all' before clicking footer-legal-* in future tests, or use scroll_into_view_if_needed + force=True.
